intro: Brenania brieyi, also known as Brenania, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimalarial activities, as well as potential applications in treating fever and respiratory infections. Bioactive constituents of Brenania brieyi include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
